about.title: 💡 About
about.description: 4+ years building scalable full-stack applications using React, Angular, Java, Python, and cloud technologies. Specialist in microservices, RESTful APIs, and DevOps. Impact in FinTech and InsureTech with proven expertise in both frontend and backend architecture.

experience.description: Led AI-driven insurance claims automation platform reducing manual processing by 40%. Developed resilient RESTful APIs with Spring Boot reducing API latency by 30%. Built responsive Angular interfaces achieving 99.9% uptime through Spring Cloud microservices.

Developed cloud-native financial transaction platform reducing abandonment by 22%. Designed secure RESTful APIs for real-time validation and integration. Implemented asynchronous Kafka-based event processing enabling seamless settlement notifications.
